kept.title: DyFlow: Dynamic Workflow Framework for Agentic Reasoning
kept.reason: Dynamic LLM agent framework for code generation with feedback-driven workflow adaptation and structured reasoning.

kept.title: Reinforcement Learning with Backtracking Feedback
kept.reason: LLM safety alignment via RL with backtracking feedback for error correction, relates to reliability mechanisms.

kept.title: Latent Chain-of-Thought for Visual Reasoning
kept.reason: Proposes a method for generating diverse, reliable reasoning chains (latent CoT) for LVLMs, aligning with structured reasoning and reliability themes.

kept.title: More Than Just Functional: LLM-as-a-Critique for Efficient Code Generation
kept.reason: Uses LLM as a 'critique' to improve code efficiency, a reliability method for LLM-generated code.

kept.title: Reinforcement Learning Finetunes Small Subnetworks in Large Language Models
kept.reason: Analyzes RL fine-tuning for LLMs, showing sparse parameter updates. Relevant to reliability and statistical properties of LLM workflows.
